【基建】 【无CP】李月穿越了！命运不公老天爷给她安排在了远古时期，一个衣服没有鞋子没有、就连吃都成了问题的远古部落，索性李月心态比较好，既来之，则安之！\n一切从零开始吧！女主决定要带领部落发展壮大，从吃饱穿暖再到部落迁徙，盖房屋，挖陷阱，制盐，铺路，开启农耕时代……\n本文为基建文，无cp，更多详情请移步正文","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/0088c38f9b0a8c99e7ac91641874bdef~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"控糖杀手","author_id":"","book_id":"7571125564359068697","book_name":"穿越远古，当上首领建城池","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c080","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":23,\"name\":\"种田\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23\u0026name=种田\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":5,\"name\":\"古代言情\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5\u0026name=古代言情\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":247,\"name\":\"医术\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=247\u0026name=医术\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":828,\"name\":\"基建\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828\u0026name=基建\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":392,\"name\":\"无CP\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392\u0026name=无CP\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=0\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571138032976282137","read_count":"373","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"124377"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"58","tags":"种田,古代言情,医术,穿越,基建,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/0088c38f9b0a8c99e7ac91641874bdef~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779439457\u0026x-signature=cAXz0zxTO%2B7sw3cANQZFbwhx46w%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"31681059650
